articles.title: British crew member in need of urgent medical care amid suspected hantavirus outbreak on cruise ship
articles.description:
WHO says seven confirmed or suspected cases of hantavirus on MV Hondius, including three passengers who died

What is hantavirus, the infection thought to have killed three on cruise ship?

A British crew member was in need of urgent medical care and a passenger from the UK remained in a critical but stable condition following a suspected outbreak of hantavirus on a luxury cruise ship in the Atlantic Ocean.
Three people have died and medics on Monday were scrambling to evacuate two others from the MV Hondius, which set off in March from southern Argentina carrying 149 people from 23 countries. The crisis emerged late on Sunday after the World Health Organization (WHO) said it was investigating a suspected outbreak.

articles.title: Three passengers dead after suspected hantavirus outbreak on cruise ship
articles.description:
Dutch husband and wife and third unidentified person reported to have died, with three further people taken ill

What is hantavirus, the infection thought to have killed three on cruise ship?

A suspected outbreak of the rare hantavirus infection on a cruise ship in the Atlantic Ocean killed three people – including an elderly married couple – and sickened at least three others, the World Health Organisation (WHO) and South Africa’s health department said on Sunday.
The WHO said an investigation was under way but that at least one case of hantavirus had been confirmed. One of the patients was in intensive care in a South African hospital, the UN’s health agency said in a statement to the Associated Press, and the WHO was working with authorities to evacuate two others with symptoms from the ship.

articles.title: Canadian fiddler sues Google after AI Overview wrongly claimed he was a sex offender
articles.description:
Ashley MacIsaac, who is seeking $1.5m in civil lawsuit, says inaccurate information led to concert cancellation
An acclaimed Canadian fiddle player has launched a $1.5m civil lawsuit against Google, alleging that the online giant defamed him by falsely identifying him as a sex offender in an AI-generated summary of his life and career.
Ashley MacIsaac, a three-time Juno award-winning musician, filed the claim in the Ontario superior court of justice, asserting that Google was liable for the “foreseeable republication” of its AI-generated Overview feature, which previously published defamatory claims that he had been convicted of multiple criminal offences, including the sexual assault of a woman, internet luring involving a child with the intention of sexual assaulting the child, and assault causing bodily harm.
 Continue reading...

articles.title: Canada to be first non-European nation at EPC summit as Carney seeks allies
articles.description:
Attendance at European Political Community meeting in Yerevan seen as part of effort to build ties after US rupture
Canada is to become the first non-European country to attend a meeting of the European Political Community when the prime minister, Mark Carney, joins Monday’s summit of the 48-plus nation grouping in Yerevan, Armenia.
Carney has said he is determined to build a new network of trade and diplomatic alliances after the loss of US markets under Donald Trump. His presence will also represent a show of western support for Armenia in its efforts to distance itself from Russia at a time when Washington’s approach to Moscow’s opponents, such as Ukraine, is at best ambiguous. Canadian diplomats have rejected suggestions Ottawa might seek EU membership.
 Continue reading...

In an executive order on Friday, the US president said he would impose sanctions on people involved in broad sections of the Cuban economy, as he seeks to put more pressure on Havana after ousting Venezuela’s leader, Nicolás Maduro, earlier this year.

articles.title: Pope appoints former undocumented immigrant as bishop of West Virginia

Pope Leo XIV has appointed a man who had once entered the United States as an undocumented immigrant, hidden in the trunk of a car, as the new bishop of West Virginia.

articles.titleJa: モンスタートラックが群衆に突っ込み3人死亡
articles.summary: コロンビアのショーでモンスタートラックが観客に突っ込み、3人が死亡、少なくとも38人が負傷した。

articles.title: Jury convicts former Florida congressman in Venezuela lobbying case
articles.description: David Rivera, Marco Rubio's former housemate, was accused of accepting millions from the Maduro regime to lobby US politicians.
articles.titleJa: フロリダ州元下院議員、ベネズエラロビー活動事件で有罪評決
articles.summary: 米国フロリダ州の元下院議員が、マドゥロ政権から数百万ドルを受け取り、米国の政治家へロビー活動を行ったとして有罪評決を受けた。

articles.title: Huge crowd attends free Shakira Copacabana beach concert
articles.description: Shakira's appearance followed shows by Lady Gaga and Madonna, who have also performed on Copacabana beach in previous years.
articles.titleJa: コパカバーナビーチでのシャキーラの無料コンサートに大勢の観客
articles.summary: シャキーラがコパカバーナビーチで無料コンサートを開催し、過去のレディー・ガガやマドンナの公演と同様に大勢の観客を魅了した。

articles.title: Cuba condemns new US sanctions as 'illegal' and 'abusive'
articles.description: The new measures come on top of a US blockade of oil to Cuba that has caused widespread blackouts and fuel shortages.
articles.titleJa: キューバ、米国の新たな制裁を「違法」かつ「不当」と非難
articles.summary: キューバが米国の新たな制裁を「違法」で「不当」と非難。これらの措置は、米国による原油禁輸措置に加えて、広範な停電と燃料不足を引き起こしている。

articles.title: Brazil's Congress approves plan to drastically cut Bolsonaro's jail term
articles.description: Last year ex-president Jair Bolsonaro was sentenced to 27 years in jail for plotting a coup after losing an election.
articles.titleJa: ブラジル議会、ボルソナロ元大統領の刑期大幅短縮計画を承認
articles.summary: ブラジル議会が、選挙敗北後にクーデターを企てたとして27年の判決を受けたボルソナロ元大統領の刑期を大幅に短縮する計画を承認した。

articles.title: Rubio downplays reports US could review UK's claim to Falklands
articles.description: The US secretary of state says a leaked memo suggesting America's position on the territory could be changed "was just an email".
articles.titleJa: ルビオ氏、米国がフォークランド諸島に対する英国の主張を見直す可能性の報道を軽視
articles.summary: 米国務長官は、米国がフォークランド諸島に対する英国の主張を見直す可能性があるとする流出メモについて「単なるメール」だと重要視しない姿勢を示した。

articles.title: Global forest loss slows but El Niño fires could threaten progress
articles.description: The loss of tropical rainforests eased last year, according to new analysis, but scientists warn they are still disappearing rapidly.
articles.titleJa: 世界の森林減少は鈍化するも、エルニーニョ現象による火災が進行を脅かす可能性
articles.summary: 昨年、熱帯雨林の減少は緩和されたが、科学者たちは依然として急速に失われていると警告。エルニーニョ現象による火災が今後の進展を脅かす可能性がある。

articles.title: The other life of US soldier accused of betting on Maduro's removal
articles.description: The Army officer charged with using classified information to win $400,000 is also a real estate investor with rave reviews on Airbnb.
articles.titleJa: マドゥロ失脚に賭けた容疑の米兵のもう一つの顔
articles.summary: 機密情報を使って40万ドルを稼いだとして起訴された米陸軍将校が、Airbnbで高評価の不動産投資家としての別の顔も持っていたことが判明した。

articles.title: Making history and facing Neymar - Lingard on life in Brazil
articles.description: In his first major interview since moving to Brazil, Jesse Lingard talks to the BBC about his new life, and Manchester United.
articles.titleJa: 歴史を作りネイマールと対戦――リンガードが語るブラジルでの生活
articles.summary: ブラジルに移籍後初の主要インタビューで、ジェシー・リンガードが新たな生活やマンチェスター・ユナイテッドについて語った。

articles.title: The human cost of the data center push in Latin America
articles.description: In this cross-border article, Global Voices is sharing stories from several countries in Latin America where communities are pushing back against AI-driven data center development.
articles.titleJa: ラテンアメリカにおけるデータセンター推進の人道的代償
articles.summary: ラテンアメリカの複数の国で、AIデータセンター開発に対する地域社会の反発とその人道的影響を追う記事。

articles.title: Brazil: A warning on how AI and deepfakes can become an ’excessive risk‘ to women and girls
articles.description: A technical note by research center Internetlab points out that advances in synthetic image creators increase the risks of gender violence online and talks about platforms’ accountability
articles.titleJa: ブラジル：AIとディープフェイクが女性や少女にとって「過度なリスク」となりうるという警告
articles.summary: ブラジルでの研究が、AIによる合成画像生成がオンラインでのジェンダー暴力のリスクを高め、プラットフォームの責任を指摘している。

articles.title: AI hype narrative reaches the public healthcare system in El Salvador
articles.description: This time we take you to El Salvador, examining government claims that an AI-supported transformation of the public healthcare system will make it the most advanced in the world.
articles.titleJa: エルサルバドルでAIの誇大宣伝が公共医療システムに波及
articles.summary: エルサルバドル政府による、AIを活用した公共医療システムの変革が世界最先端になるとの主張を検証。

articles.title: The technological transformation of Colombia's armed conflict
articles.description: More than simply a uniform adoption of artificial intelligence, a technological innovation has emerged that is transforming the battlefield, decision-making processes, local narratives, and forms of social control.
articles.titleJa: コロンビアにおける武力紛争の技術的変革
articles.summary: コロンビアの武力紛争が、AIなどの技術革新により戦場、意思決定、社会統制の形を変化させている。

articles.title: When dry season never ends
articles.description: In an era marked by intense transnational mobility, the uneven distribution of rights and experiences in host communities reflects underlying dynamics of power and privilege that demand further scrutiny.
articles.titleJa: 乾季が終わらないとき
articles.summary: 国境を越える移動が活発な時代に、受け入れコミュニティにおける権利と経験の不均衡が権力と特権の根底にある力学を反映している。

articles.title: Community micro-hydropower plants revolutionise isolated areas of the Dominican Republic
articles.description: Community micro-hydropower projects in the DR rely on local leadership to deliver energy from renewable sources to isolated areas excluded from national distribution systems, contributing to reduced greenhouse gas emissions.
articles.titleJa: ドミニカ共和国の遠隔地を革新するコミュニティ主導の小水力発電所
articles.summary: ドミニカ共和国で、コミュニティ主導の小水力発電が、国の送電網から取り残された地域に再生可能エネルギーを供給し、温室効果ガス削減に貢献している。

articles.title: How Bad Bunny brought the issue of Puerto Rico’s power grid into world view
articles.description: Puerto Rico’s electricity system has faced repeated crises since 2017’s Hurricane Maria, which destroyed much of the grid and triggered the longest blackout in modern U.S. history; outages remain routine.
articles.titleJa: バッド・バニーがプエルトリコの電力網問題を世界に知らしめた経緯
articles.summary: プエルトリコの電力システムはハリケーン・マリア以来危機に直面し、停電が常態化している問題をバッド・バニーが世界に訴えかけた。

articles.title: Ecuador’s Netanyahu and Trump supporters target Ecuadorian–Iranian Cultural Center
articles.description: Wars no longer have defined frontlines. Battlefields can be anywhere those in power decide that a neighbor, due to their faith, ethnicity, or background, is an enemy.
articles.titleJa: エクアドルのネタニヤフおよびトランプ支持者がエクアドル・イラン文化センターを標的
articles.summary: エクアドルでネタニヤフとトランプの支持者たちがエクアドル・イラン文化センターを標的にし、思想的対立が国内に波及する状況を描写。

articles.title: Concerns grow as Jamaica ends Cuban medical programme
articles.description: Terminating the decades-old programme that brought hundreds of Cuban medical personnel to its shores is an unusual move, especially for a programme that had been running smoothly for 50 years.
articles.titleJa: ジャマイカがキューバ人医療プログラムを終了し懸念が高まる
articles.summary: ジャマイカが50年間続いていたキューバ人医療従事者受け入れプログラムを終了し、その決定がもたらす影響について懸念が広がっている。

articles.title: From menstrual dignity to digital safety: How grassroots feminists are redefining gender justice
articles.description: What connects a pad box in a Nigerian school, a coalition meeting in Pakistan, and a digital security workshop in Paraguay? They each address a structural barrier that limits women’s participation.
articles.titleJa: 月経の尊厳からデジタル安全まで：草の根フェミニストがいかにジェンダー正義を再定義しているか
articles.summary: ナイジェリア、パキスタン、パラグアイの事例を通じて、草の根フェミニストが女性の社会参加を妨げる構造的障壁に取り組み、ジェンダー正義を再定義する活動を描写。

articles.title: 'We won't see her because she's Asian': How Lea Salonga fought to be seen on Broadway
articles.description: Broadway icon and Disney princess Lea Salonga has paved the way for Asian actors - but it hasn't been easy.
articles.titleJa: 「彼女はアジア人だからダメだ」：レア・サロンガはいかにしてブロードウェイで認められるために闘ったか
articles.summary: ブロードウェイのアイコンであるレア・サロンガは、アジア系俳優のために道を切り開いたが、その道のりは容易ではなかった。彼女の苦闘と功績を伝える記事。

articles.title: Samsung family pays off record $8bn inheritance tax bill
articles.description: The bill is tied to the estate left by the firm's late chairman Lee Kun-hee, who died in  October 2020.
articles.titleJa: サムスン創業家、史上最高額80億ドルの相続税を完納
articles.summary: サムスン創業家が、故イ・ゴンヒ会長の遺産にかかる史上最高額80億ドルの相続税を完納した。2020年10月の死去以来の課題だった。

articles.title: Man charged with murder of 5-year-old Australian girl
articles.description: The girl's death sparked an outbreak of violence in the central Australian town from where she disappeared.
articles.titleJa: オーストラリアで5歳女児殺害の容疑で男を訴追
articles.summary: オーストラリアで、行方不明になっていた5歳女児の殺害容疑で男が訴追された。女児の死は、中央オーストラリアの町で暴力事件を引き起こした。

articles.title: Myanmar ex-leader Aung San Suu Kyi moved to house arrest, military says
articles.description: The Nobel Peace Prize laureate has been in detention since she was ousted in a military coup in 2021.
articles.titleJa: ミャンマー元指導者アウン・サン・スー・チー氏、自宅軟禁に移送と軍が発表
articles.summary: 軍事クーデターで失脚し拘束されていたミャンマーのノーベル平和賞受賞者アウン・サン・スー・チー氏が、自宅軟禁に移されたと軍が発表した。

articles.title: A 17th Century 'supercomputer' once owned by Indian royalty sells for record in auction
articles.description: The astrolabe - or astronomical computer - is possibly the largest in existence and had never been exhibited before.
articles.titleJa: 17世紀の「スーパーコンピューター」、インド王族が所有していたものがオークションで記録的な価格に
articles.summary: 17世紀にインド王族が所有していたとされる史上最大級のアストロラーベ（天体観測儀）が、オークションで記録的な高値で落札された。

articles.title: China to ban drone sales in Beijing citing security concerns
articles.description: Drone users will also be required to register their devices and secure permits before flying them.
articles.titleJa: 中国、安全保障上の懸念から北京でのドローン販売を禁止へ
articles.summary: 中国政府は安全保障上の理由から、北京でのドローン販売を禁止すると発表した。使用者には登録と飛行許可も義務付けられる。

articles.title: Violence in Australian town after arrest of man over girl's murder
articles.description: Unrest took place outside hospital where man suspected of murdering a five-year-old girl was being treated.
articles.titleJa: 女児殺害容疑の男逮捕後、オーストラリアの町で暴力行為
articles.summary: 5歳女児殺害の容疑で男が逮捕された後、治療を受けていた病院前で暴動が発生。オーストラリアの町で緊張が高まっている。

articles.title: It's not just oil: Iran war also threatens Asia's food security
articles.description: Planting season is beginning in Asia - but the closure of the Strait of Hormuz and Chinese restrictions has hit fertiliser supply.
articles.titleJa: 石油だけではない：イラン戦争はアジアの食料安全保障も脅かす
articles.summary: イラン戦争がホルムズ海峡の閉鎖と中国の制限を通じて、アジアの肥料供給を直撃。アジアの食料安全保障が深刻な脅威に直面している。

articles.title: The world wants to eliminate cervical cancer - how Australian scientists led the way
articles.description: For the first time, Australia has recorded no new cervical cancer diagnoses in women under 25. To get there, they vaccinated young men.
articles.titleJa: 世界が子宮頸がんの撲滅を目指す中、オーストラリアの科学者はいかにして道を切り開いたか
articles.summary: オーストラリアは25歳未満の女性で子宮頸がんの新規診断がないという初の成果を達成。若年男性へのワクチン接種が鍵となった。

articles.title: Aung San Suu Kyi: The Myanmar democracy icon detained for years
articles.description: Little has been heard of Myanmar's former leader since she was ousted in a military coup in 2021.
articles.titleJa: アウン・サン・スー・チー：長年拘束されているミャンマーの民主化の象徴
articles.summary: 2021年の軍事クーデターで失脚して以来、ミャンマーの元指導者アウン・サン・スー・チー氏についてはほとんど情報がなかった。

articles.title: Trade Policy Review: Belize
articles.description: The fourth review of the trade policies and practices of Belize takes place on 4 and 6 May 2026. The basis for the review is a report by the WTO Secretariat and a report by the Government of Belize.
articles.titleJa: 貿易政策レビュー：ベリーズ
articles.summary: ベリーズの貿易政策と慣行に関する第4回レビューが2026年5月4日と6日に行われます。

articles.title: Members adopt rules of procedure at first Fisheries Subsidies Committee meeting
articles.description: WTO members held the first regular meeting of the Committee on Fisheries Subsidies on 1 May 2026, marking a milestone in the implementation of the Agreement on Fisheries Subsidies. They approved various decisions on the functioning of the Committee.
articles.titleJa: 漁業補助金委員会が初会合で手続き規則を採択
articles.summary: WTO加盟国は2026年5月1日に第1回漁業補助金委員会定期会合を開催し、合意の実施に向けた節目となった。

articles.title: Transparency on subsidies remains central focus of SCM Committee
articles.description: At regular and special meetings of the Committee on Subsidies and Countervailing Measures (SCM) on 30 April 2026, improving transparency through the timely and complete submission of subsidy notifications was once again a central theme of the Committee’s work. The Chair, Jungsoo Hur of the Republic of Korea, emphasized the critical importance of transparency for the effective operation of the Committee and expressed concern about the continued low level of compliance with notification obligations. He strongly encouraged members to submit their outstanding notifications as soon as possible.
articles.titleJa: 補助金に関する透明性がSMC委員会の中心的な焦点であり続ける
articles.summary: 2026年4月30日の補助金・相殺措置委員会（SCM）の会合では、補助金通知の適時かつ完全な提出による透明性の向上が中心テーマとなった。

articles.title: WTO opens online registration for 2026 Public Forum, launches call for proposals
articles.description: The WTO has opened online registration for this year’s Public Forum, titled Powering the Future, which will take place at the WTO premises in Geneva from 15 to 17 September. It has also launched a call for proposals for the event, which this year will focus on services trade.
articles.titleJa: WTO、2026年パブリックフォーラムのオンライン登録を開始、提案募集も開始
articles.summary: WTOは2026年9月15日から17日までジュネーブで開催されるパブリックフォーラムのオンライン登録を開始し、サービス貿易に焦点を当てる。

articles.title: Canada commits CAD 500,000 to strengthen food safety and plant and animal health capacity
articles.description: Canada is providing CAD 500,000 (approximately CHF 286,000) to the Standards and Trade Development Facility (STDF) to strengthen sanitary and phytosanitary (SPS) capacity of public and private sector stakeholders in developing and least-developed countries. The contribution will support STDF activities that help countries meet international food safety and plant and animal health standards and facilitate safe trade, based on the STDF Strategy for 2025-2030.
articles.titleJa: カナダ、食品安全・動植物検疫能力強化に50万カナダドルを拠出
articles.summary: カナダは、開発途上国・後発開発途上国の公的・民間セクターのSPS能力強化のため、STDFに50万カナダドルを拠出する。

articles.title: Members review notifications, anti-dumping actions at regular spring meeting of Committee
articles.description: The WTO’s Committee on Anti-Dumping Practices met on 28 April 2026 to review members’ latest notifications of new, amended or previously reviewed anti-dumping laws and regulations as well as reports on anti-dumping actions.
articles.titleJa: 加盟国、定期春季会合で通知、反ダンピング措置を審査
articles.summary: WTO反ダンピング措置委員会は2026年4月28日に会合を開き、加盟国による最新の反ダンピング法規の通知や措置報告を審査した。

articles.title: WTO members review safeguard actions, exchange views on measures affecting steel products
articles.description: At a meeting on 27 April, the WTO Committee on Safeguards reviewed safeguard actions covering 38 products, 12 of which were steel/metal products. These actions were notified by members since the Committee's last meeting in October 2025. Several members expressed their views on the European Union's and the United Kingdom's actions concerning steel products. The EU investigation on grain-oriented electrical steel and measure on ferro-alloying elements also generated interventions by several members. The outgoing Chair, Ms Milagros Miranda Rojas (Peru), thanked members for their participation in the Committee.
articles.titleJa: WTO加盟国、セーフガード措置を審査、鉄鋼製品に影響を与える措置について意見交換
articles.summary: WTOセーフガード委員会は4月27日の会合で、鉄鋼/金属製品12件を含む38製品のセーフガード措置を審査し、EUと英国の鉄鋼製品に関する措置について意見交換した。

articles.title: WTO project aims to step up ePing use to increase transparency and market access in Africa
articles.description: Implementation of a WTO initiative to strengthen use of the ePing SPS & TBT Platform is now under way, helping governments, exporters and other stakeholders better track and engage in evolving product requirements affecting international trade. Funded by the Standards and Trade Development Facility (STDF), the three year project focuses on five African countries and aims to enhance transparency, predictability and market access.
articles.titleJa: WTOプロジェクト、アフリカでの透明性と市場アクセス向上に向けePing活用を強化
articles.summary: WTOは、アフリカ5カ国を対象に、ePingプラットフォームの活用を強化し、貿易に関する規制への対応と市場アクセスを改善するプロジェクトを開始する。

articles.title: TRIPS Council considers technology transfer, digitalization and non-violation complaints
articles.description: At a meeting of the Council for Trade-Related Aspects of Intellectual Property Rights (TRIPS) on 23-24 April, items discussed by WTO members included technology transfer, digitalization of IP offices, and TRIPS non-violation and situation complaints. In the meeting, chaired by Emmanuelle Ivanov-Durand of France, members were also updated on notifications under various provisions of the TRIPS Agreement, including through the WTO Secretariat's sixth Annual Transparency Report. Mr Alaa Hegazy of Egypt was elected chair for the coming year.
articles.titleJa: TRIPS理事会、技術移転、デジタル化、非違反苦情を検討
articles.summary: TRIPS理事会は4月23～24日の会合で、技術移転、知的財産庁のデジタル化、非違反苦情などを議論した。

articles.title: India launches safeguard investigation on soda ash
articles.description: On 24 April 2026, India notified the WTO’s Committee on Safeguards that it had initiated on 16 March 2026 a safeguard investigation on imports of soda ash.
articles.titleJa: インド、ソーダ灰のセーフガード調査を開始
articles.summary: インドは2026年4月24日、ソーダ灰の輸入に関するセーフガード調査を2026年3月16日に開始したとWTOに通知した。
